name: Highland Ridge Community Clubhouse
description: Highland Ridge Community Clubhouse is a place to play pickleball in Johnson City, TN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Lincoln Park
description: Lincoln Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jonesborough, TN. There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The court is free.

name: Memorial Park Community Center
description: There are 12 permanent lighted asphalt courts outside.  The center allows pickleball inside gymnasium from 9am-12pm five days a week, but participants must set up provided temporary nets.

name: Metro Kiwanis Park
description: Come play pickleball at Metro Kiwanis Park in Johnson City, TN! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Stage Road Park
description: Stage Road Park is a place to play pickleball in Jonesborough, TN. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. You can’t reserve the court. The court is free.

name: Tiger Park
description: Work still in progress, but courts are play-ready.
address: North Cherokee Street & Tavern Hill Road

name: Word of Life Church
description: Word of Life Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Johnson City, TN. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
